additions.description: New terms to add to the index. Each entry follows the same structure as full-mode terms. Aliases MUST be exact strings from the new candidate input for location mapping.

parent.description: Parent term for hierarchy (omit if top-level).

aliases.description: Other surface forms from the candidate input.

see_also.description: Related terms (must exist in output or existing index).

main_files.description: Files with substantive discussion of this term.

modifications.description: Changes to existing terms. Only include fields that are changing. A reason is REQUIRED to justify each modification.

term.description: Exact name of the existing term being modified.

removals.description: Terms to remove from the index. Only for terms that are genuinely stale — no longer relevant to the corpus.

term.description: Exact name of the term to remove.

reason.description: Why this term should be removed.

suggested.description: New terms Claude spotted that the extraction missed. Same as full-mode suggested — no locations, no aliases.

parent.description: Parent term for hierarchy (omit if top-level).
